overall.description: A flying vehicle navigates through the neon-lit skyscrapers of Night City at night. The footage shows a continuous flight from street level up through dense urban canyons, passing holographic advertisements and illuminated buildings. This is gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showcasing the city's vertical architecture and cyberpunk aesthetic.

events.description: vehicle takes off from street level and begins ascending vertically
perspective shifts from ground driving to aerial ascent between buildings

agents.ego_description: piloting a flying vehicle through the city streets and initiating vertical takeoff

entered.detail: rain-slicked multi-lane road with reflective surface
bright pink and cyan neon signs on building facades
illuminated traffic signals at the intersection ahead
futuristic skyscrapers with illuminated windows lining the street

segments.scene_description: The segment begins at street level on wet asphalt roads illuminated by neon signs. The vehicle accelerates and takes off vertically, transitioning from ground driving to flight while neon-lit buildings line both sides of the street.

scene_state.functional_zone: elevated view of city plaza and park

events.description: moves from enclosed street canyon to open aerial view overlooking plaza
levels out from steep ascent to forward flight over the plaza

agents.ego_description: ascending alongside a skyscraper while overlooking an illuminated plaza below

entered.detail: tall building with distinctive vertical green neon light strips
illuminated public square with trees and pathways visible below

segments.scene_description: The vehicle ascends past a skyscraper with distinctive vertical green neon lighting, revealing an open view of a plaza with illuminated trees and pathways below. The perspective shifts from enclosed street to open aerial space.

scene_state.functional_zone: dense urban canyon between skyscrapers with heavy advertising

events.description: enters dense urban canyon between tall buildings covered in advertisements
makes sharp banking turn between closely spaced buildings

agents.ego_description: navigating through narrow gaps between skyscrapers covered in holographic advertisements

entered.detail: large floating digital advertisements projecting from building sides
tall building facades creating a narrow canyon on both sides

segments.scene_description: Flying through a narrow urban canyon flanked by massive skyscrapers covered in bright holographic billboards and digital advertisements. The vehicle maneuvers through tight spaces between the high-rise structures.

scene_state.functional_zone: elevated highway corridor with adjacent office towers

events.description: passes alongside elevated highway with moderate moving traffic
moves from dense building canyon to open highway corridor

agents.ego_description: flying alongside elevated highways and between glass office towers

notable_agents.action: multiple cars driving on the elevated highway below the flight path

entered.detail: multi-level highway structure with moving traffic and orange railings
modern skyscrapers with reflective glass facades and illuminated windows

segments.scene_description: The vehicle flies alongside an elevated highway with moderate traffic, passing modern glass office towers. The scene opens up slightly compared to the previous dense canyon, revealing more of the city's infrastructure.

scene_state.functional_zone: dense neon district with massive digital billboards and holographic advertisements

events.description: enters area with extremely dense neon signage and holographic displays
banks sharply between buildings to avoid collision with structures

agents.ego_description: weaving between skyscrapers covered in massive digital billboards and neon signs

entered.detail: large digital billboard displaying 'WET DREAM' in bright colors
skyscraper with prominent red 'Fuyutsuki' signage at the top

segments.scene_description: Navigating through the dense neon district, the vehicle passes iconic billboards including 'WET DREAM' and 'Fuyutsuki' advertisements. The environment is saturated with cyan and pink neon light from massive digital displays covering the skyscrapers.

scene_state.functional_zone: dark building canyon with minimal lighting and red aviation markers

events.description: enters darker corridor between buildings with reduced neon lighting
descends through narrow gap between dark skyscrapers

agents.ego_description: descending through a dark urban canyon with only red aviation lights visible ahead

entered.detail: narrow passage between dark unlit building facades
red warning lights on building structures ahead

segments.scene_description: The final segment descends into a dark canyon between buildings where neon lighting gives way to darkness punctuated only by red aviation warning lights. The vehicle navigates through increasingly narrow passages as the visibility drops.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous aerial ascent from the neon-drenched streets of a futuristic city into its dense vertical canyons before descending into a dark urban void. It begins at street level on wet asphalt, accelerating vertically away from the ground as the perspective shifts from enclosed roads to an open aerial view of a plaza with illuminated trees. The camera then maneuvers through narrow urban canyons flanked by massive skyscrapers and holographic billboards, eventually opening up to fly alongside an elevated highway and glass office towers. As the flight continues through the heart of the neon district, the environment becomes saturated with cyan and pink light from iconic digital displays like Wet Dream and Fuyutsuki. Finally, the vehicle dives into a dark canyon between buildings where the vibrant neon fades, leaving only red aviation warning lights to punctuate the deepening shadows.
